global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and headline with a clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to start binge-watching new content.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo featuring the text 'StarVault' in a prominent position at the top.

elements.label: Binge starts now
elements.description: A large, eye-catching headline that reads 'Binge starts now' in a modern font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: New hits every week
elements.description: A smaller text line below the headline that states 'New hits every week', providing additional context.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Start now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes in the background, adding visual interest without distracting from the main message.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An indistinct shape that does not convey specific information or branding.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another abstract shape that contributes to the overall design but lacks identifiable features.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, enhancing the design's aesthetics.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The main message text that encourages users to start watching, prominently displayed.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: StarVault title
elements.description: The title 'StarVault' displayed at the top, indicating the brand or service being advertised.

elements.label: Start now text
elements.description: A call-to-action text 'Start now' located at the bottom, inviting users to engage.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, StarVault logo, binge starts now.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
